title: Housekeeping Supervisor
description:
Housekeeping Supervisor (Rooms)

Duties:

  • A hands-on person is required for this job
  • Supervise the activities of room maids
  • Assign apartments for room maids to clean, monitor and follow up on their work performance
  • Check apartments before releasing for arrival of guests
  • Attend to guests' feedback and request
  • Conduct morning briefing to team of housekeeping staff

Requirements:

  • Minimum 1 year of housekeeping experience in a supervisory position from serviced apartment or hotels
  • Minimum Secondary school, GCE ''N'' or "O" levels are welcome
  • Hands-on person with cheerful personality, good communication skills and is PC literate
  • Must be service-oriented and is able to work in a fast paced environment
  • Able to work independently as well as within a team
  • Able to work on rotating shifts on weekends and public holidays
  • Entry level candidates from hospitality management may apply
  • *Uniform and Duty meal are provided.

Entry level candidates are welcome to apply. Salary will commensurate with experience.

postedCompany.description:
Treetops Executive Residences is a luxurious serviced apartment managed by DTZ Debenham Tie Leung Hospitality Management Services.  Featuring 220 units of  one to three bedroom fully serviced suites, it is the perfect eco-luxurious environment for a refreshing resort style home away from home experience.

Located along Orange Grove Road, It is hard to believe that vibrant Orchard Road, Singapore’s shopping and entertainment hub, is just a leisurely stroll away from Treetops’ five acres of greens teeming with lovingly tended native trees and plants.

Take in a glorious medley of flora and fauna, and let the soothing effects of nature’s wonders linger on as you discover a wide array of dining, entertainment and retail options in Singapore’s city centre amidst our wide range of amenities and services to care for your daily, recreational and business needs.

Treetops is the ideal retreat for any city dweller who wishes to escape the hustle and bustle of city life without compromising on conveniences. Complement with seamless hospitality and the inculcation of a healthy living experience, Treetops offers a conducive and environmental-friendly home away from home for the most discerning traveller.

For a holistic eco-luxury living experience, Treetops Executive Residences also aim to go back to basics and seek the purest state of essential needs in life, which is to improve the quality of living for all our guests and staff. Our philosophy, Discover Green, harmonizes our ethos of warmth, hospitality and healthy living, bringing you a residential concept that will nurture your body, mind and soul for  total well-being.

Today, Treetops is the one of the leading serviced apartments in Singapore and has since become a preferred choice of home for senior managers and leisure travelers round the world.
postedCompany.name: TREETOPS EXECUTIVE RESIDENCES

districts.location: D10 Ardmore, Bukit Timah, Holland Road, Tanglin
